name: jarbou3i-research-engine
description: Jarbou3i Research Engine beta: backend proxy smoke-tested with local Worker QA, provider safety, response validation, BYOK mode, run ledger, analysis compiler, evidence matrix, and Quality Gate v2.

scripts.test: npm run test:qa && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:qa: node tests/qa-check.mjs && node tests/research-workflow-check.mjs && node tests/provider-response-check.mjs && node tests/provider-fixtures-check.mjs && node tests/research-module-check.mjs && node tests/backend-proxy-check.mjs && node tests/backend-worker-smoke.mjs
